name: Abominable Chamber of the Unchained
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 "Unchained" monster from your hand or GY. If this Set card is destroyed by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Unchained" monster from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Abominable Chamber of the Unchained" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Unchained" monster from your hand or GY. If this Set card is destroyed by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Unchained" monster from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Abominable Chamber of the Unchained" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
